contract.goal: Fire a workflow, kill it mid-run, and confirm loom state is at this checkpoint with no resolution checkin.
acceptance_criteria: after the kill, loom shows this checkin and no resolution checkin
the killed workflow's own side-effects (scratch appends) are partial-but-atomic
the loop can recover from this checkpoint and re-fire
rules_applied: loop owns all loom writes; workflow is killed before any verdict is recorded
disqualifiers: loom state corrupted by the kill
half-written records in the scratch log

changes_since_previous: Pre-workflow checkpoint for the kill-recovery probe. No resolution checkin will follow the killed run — that is the recovery point.
